title.zh: 海康威视配置文件未授权访问与解密
title.en: Hikvision Configuration Files Unauthorized Access and Decryption

description.zh: 本文档记录了海康威视监控设备管理后台存在的未授权访问漏洞，通过构造特定auth参数可绕过登录，获取所有用户列表、下载加密配置文件并进行解密，最终提取明文凭据，同时还可获取监控快照。
description.en: This document details an unauthorized access vulnerability in Hikvision surveillance device management backends. By crafting a specific 'auth' parameter, login can be bypassed to retrieve user lists, download encrypted configuration files, decrypt them to obtain plaintext credentials, and capture device snapshots.

annotation.zh: 使用FOFA搜索引擎语法定位公网暴露的海康威视视频监控设备。
annotation.en: Use FOFA search syntax to locate publicly exposed Hikvision video surveillance devices.

annotation.zh: 漏洞利用的关键在于构造特定格式的auth参数。对字符串 'admin:11' 进行Base64编码，该值用于后续所有未授权请求。
annotation.en: The key to exploiting the vulnerability is crafting a specific 'auth' parameter. Base64-encode the string 'admin:11', which will be used in all subsequent unauthorized requests.

content.zh: 检索所有用户及其角色列表
content.en: Retrieve List of All Users and Their Roles

annotation.zh: 通过未授权接口获取设备上所有用户的详细信息，包括用户名、优先级、IP/MAC地址及用户级别。
annotation.en: Fetch detailed information of all users on the device via the unauthorized interface, including username, priority, IP/MAC address, and user level.

caption.zh: 未授权用户列表请求示例

caption.en: Example XML Response with User Information

content.zh: 下载加密的账号密码配置文件
content.en: Download Encrypted Configuration File Containing Credentials

annotation.zh: 通过未授权接口下载设备的配置文件。该文件为PGP加密格式，需进一步解密才能获得明文凭据。
annotation.en: Download the device's configuration file via the unauthorized interface. The file is in PGP encrypted format and requires further decryption to obtain plaintext credentials.

caption.zh: 配置文件下载请求示例

codeBlocks.code:
file configurationFile
configurationFile: PGP Secret Key -

content.zh: 配置文件解密工具使用说明
content.en: Configuration File Decryption Tool Usage Instructions

annotation.zh: 下载的配置文件需使用Windows平台下的专用工具 hikvision-decrypter.exe 进行解密。按照步骤打开文件、解密数据并保存解密后的配置文件。
annotation.en: The downloaded configuration file must be decrypted using the dedicated tool 'hikvision-decrypter.exe' on Windows. Follow the steps to open the file, decrypt the data, and save the decrypted configuration file.

codeBlocks.code:
Open Configuration File -> 
Encrypted -> 
Decrypt Data(Decrypting AES...) -> 
(Successfully decrypted data) -> 
Save Configuration File.

content.zh: 从解密数据中提取明文密码
content.en: Extract Plaintext Password from Decrypted Data

annotation.zh: 使用十六进制编辑器（如010 Editor）打开解密后的文件，搜索字符串 'admin' 即可找到对应的明文密码（例如 admin:asdf1234）。
annotation.en: Open the decrypted file with a hex editor (e.g., 010 Editor) and search for the string 'admin' to locate the corresponding plaintext password (e.g., admin:asdf1234).

caption.en: Example of Searching for Plaintext Credentials

codeBlocks.code:
Search String: admin
Found Credential: admin:asdf1234

annotation.zh: 通过未授权接口直接获取当前监控画面的快照图片，无需登录。
annotation.en: Directly capture a snapshot of the current surveillance feed via an unauthorized interface without logging in.

annotation.zh: 本文档涉及的工具下载及参考链接汇总。
annotation.en: Summary of tool downloads and reference links mentioned in this document.

caption.zh: 解密后的配置文件样本
